translations.en: I run into Paul at the supermarket.
translations.es: Me encuentro con Paul en el supermercado.
translations.vi: Tôi tình cờ gặp Paul ở siêu thị.
translations.nl: Ik kom Paul tegen in de supermarkt.
translations.hi: मैं सुपरमार्केट में पॉल से टकरा जाता हूँ.
translations.el: Συναντώ τον Πολ στο σούπερ μάρκετ.
translations.sv: Jag stöter på Paul i mataffären.
translations.da: Jeg støder ind i Paul i supermarkedet.
translations.ja: スーパーでポールにばったり会う。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the subject (speaker).
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; means ‘to run into/meet’ and takes a direct object.
Proper noun; direct object (the person being met).
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and determiner ‘le’; introduces a locative complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition (location).

sentences.target: Tu croises souvent des voisins ici.

translations.fr: Tu croises souvent des voisins ici.
translations.en: You often run into neighbors here.
translations.es: Aquí te encuentras a menudo con vecinos.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在这里经常遇到邻居。
translations.yue: 你喺呢度經常撞到鄰居。
translations.ru: Здесь ты часто сталкиваешься с соседями.
translations.he: אתה נתקל כאן לעיתים קרובות בשכנים.
translations.vi: Bạn thường gặp hàng xóm ở đây.
translations.ar: أنت كثيرًا ما تصادف جيرانًا هنا.
translations.nl: Hier kom je vaak buren tegen.
translations.hi: तुम यहाँ अक्सर पड़ोसियों से टकरा जाते हो.
translations.id: Di sini kamu sering bertemu tetangga.
translations.sv: Här stöter du ofta på grannar.
translations.da: Her støder du ofte ind i naboer.
translations.ja: ここではよく近所の人にばったり会う。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; marks the subject (addressee).
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; denotes the action of meeting.
Frequency adverb; modifies the verb phrase to indicate habitual occurrence.
Indefinite plural article/determiner (historically contraction of ‘de’ + ‘les’); introduces a non-specific plural noun.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the verb.
Locative adverb; indicates place.

sentences.target: On va croiser du monde ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va kʁwaze dy mɔ̃d sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On va croiser du monde ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va kʁwaze dy mɔ̃d sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We're going to run into people tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche nos vamos a cruzar con gente.
translations.de: Wir werden heute Abend Leuten begegnen.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 사람들을 마주치게 될 거야.
translations.zh-Hans: 今晚我们会遇到很多人。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚會撞到好多人。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером мы встретим много народа.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vamos encontrar muita gente.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng ta sẽ tình cờ gặp nhiều người.
translations.nl: Vanavond gaan we veel mensen tegenkomen.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ми зустрінемо багато людей.
translations.hu: Ma este sok emberrel fogunk összefutni.
translations.hi: आज रात हमारा बहुत लोगों से सामना होगा.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem wpadniemy na wielu ludzi.
translations.el: Απόψε θα πέσουμε πάνω σε πολύ κόσμο.
translations.nb: I kveld kommer vi til å treffe mye folk.
translations.id: Malam ini kita akan bertemu banyak orang.
translations.sv: Ikväll kommer vi att stöta på mycket folk.
translations.ro: Diseară o să dăm peste multă lume.
translations.cs: Dnes večer narazíme na spoustu lidí.
translations.da: I aften kommer vi til at støde ind i en masse mennesker.
translations.ja: 今夜はたくさんの人にばったり会うだろう。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/personal), 3rd person singular form; often used for ‘we’ in informal speech.
Auxiliary ‘aller’, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms near-future with an infinitive.
Infinitive main verb; complements the auxiliary ‘va’ to express near-future action.
Partitive determiner (contraction of ‘de’ + ‘le’); marks an indefinite quantity.
Common noun; here used to mean ‘people/crowd’; direct object of ‘croiser’.
Demonstrative determiner; modifies ‘soir’ in a temporal noun phrase.
Common noun; temporal complement (‘this evening’).

sentences.target: Il croise sa voisine dans l'ascenseur.

translations.fr: Il croise sa voisine dans l'ascenseur.
translations.en: He runs into his neighbor in the elevator.
translations.es: Se encuentra con su vecina en el ascensor.
translations.de: Er begegnet seiner Nachbarin im Aufzug.
translations.it: Incontra la sua vicina in ascensore.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在电梯里遇到女邻居。
translations.yue: 佢喺升降機度撞到佢個女鄰居。
translations.ru: Он сталкивается со своей соседкой в лифте.
translations.pt: Ele encontra a vizinha dele no elevador.
translations.vi: Anh ấy tình cờ gặp cô hàng xóm trong thang máy.
translations.nl: Hij komt zijn buurvrouw tegen in de lift.
translations.uk: Він зустрічає свою сусідку в ліфті.
translations.hi: वह लिफ्ट में अपनी पड़ोसन से टकरा जाता है.
translations.pl: On wpada na swoją sąsiadkę w windzie.
translations.el: Συναντά τη γειτόνισσά του στο ασανσέρ.
translations.nb: Han treffer naboen sin i heisen.
translations.id: Dia bertemu tetangga perempuannya di lift.
translations.sv: Han stöter på sin granne i hissen.
translations.ro: Dă peste vecina lui în lift.
translations.da: Han støder ind i sin nabo i elevatoren.
translations.ja: 彼はエレベーターで女性の隣人にばったり会う.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; marks the subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes the action of meeting.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; agrees with ‘voisine’ and marks possession.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of the verb.
Preposition; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Noun with elided clitic determiner (‘le’ → ‘l’’); functions as the object of the preposition.

On va croiser du monde ce soir.
Il croise sa voisine dans l'ascenseur.
fu: /ɔ̃ va kʁwaze dy mɔ̃d sə swaʁ/

On va croiser du monde ce soir.
Il croise sa voisine dans l'ascenseur.
ipa: /ɔ̃ va kʁwaze dy mɔ̃d sə swaʁ/
en: I run into Paul at the supermarket.
You often run into neighbors here.
We're going to run into people tonight.
He runs into his neighbor in the elevator.

Common noun; object of the preposition (location).
